docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GABBERT, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT STUBHUB

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT THROUGH COURT CALL. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY STEFANIE TAMURA--PARALEGAL. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
